# Request for Father's Medical Records from 2002

## Inquiry Regarding Access to Historical Health Documentation

Dear Records Administrator,

I am writing to formally request access to my father's complete medical records held at your facility. These documents span the year 2002 and are essential for my current legal proceedings. My purpose is to verify specific treatment details during that period. Please advise on the exact process to obtain these records.

To facilitate this request, I have prepared the following items:
1. A certified copy of my father's driver's license.
2. A notarized authorization form signed by myself.
3. Proof of relationship to the patient.

You may find further details on your official portal at [facility website](https://www.example.com). I understand that retrieving historical data may involve specific fees or waiting periods. Please let me know if additional information is needed to proceed. I appreciate your assistance in this matter.

Thank you for your time and support regarding this request.

Sincerely,

John Doe
